content: Phase 1: Create deliverables (docker-compose.yml, .env.example, init.sh, README.md) in /app/deliverables/
Phase 1: Write Python static-validation script (YAML parse + invariants)
Phase 1: Run validations (python 42/42 + bash -n + authoritative docker compose config + init.sh e2e + fail-fast)
Phase 1: Fix until all validations pass
Phase 2: Backend (FastAPI) - serve deliverable files, downloads, zip, self-check/validation endpoint
Phase 2: Frontend (React) - dashboard: hero, architecture diagram, ports table, file viewer w/ highlight, copy/download, Fixes Applied, validation panel
Phase 2: All user stories covered in development
Phase 2: End to End Testing using Testing Agent
